title: N-1 (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|disambiguation|other pages beginning with [[Special:PrefixIndex/N1|N1]] or [[Special:PrefixIndex/N-1|N-1]]}}
'''N1''' or '''N-1''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*[[N-1 starfighter]]

===Non-canon===
*[[Sector N-One]], a section of the Death Star from ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga]]''

==Legends==
*[[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]]
*[[N1]], one of twelve equally-sized zones on the northern hemisphere of the Death Star
**[[Sector N-One/Legends|Sector N-One]], likely another term for N1
***the [[N-One Medcenter]] located in Sector N-One

{{Disambig}}
